name: natively-cluely-ai-assistant
description: Natively - Free open-source AI interview copilot & meeting assistant. The best Cluely alternative, Final Round AI alternative, and Interview Coder alternative. Real-time transcription, undetectable stealth mode, local RAG, BYOK. No subscriptions. No data breaches.

Real-time transcription, undetectable stealth mode, local RAG, BYOK. No subscriptions. No data breaches. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
